steps.eval: (()=>{const els=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')); const match=els.find(e=>e.childNodes.length<=3 && (e.textContent||'').trim().startsWith('design-chat-parity-gaps') && (e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0)); if(match){match.click(); return {clicked:true, tag:match.tagName, cls:match.className};} return {clicked:false};})()
